name: 11L Full GPTQ + Multi-Order N-gram Backoff Cache
blurb: 11L LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full Hessian GPTQ (within 600s budget) + multi-order backward-looking n-gram cache (orders 2-7). Fixed alpha=0.40 variant: 0.9757 (3-seed mean). Entropy-adaptive alpha variant: 0.9605 (3-seed mean). GPTQ calibration reserved within training budget (train 586s + GPTQ 10s = 596s). N-gram cache is purely eval-time, backward-looking, no oracle selection.
author: Raahil Shah
